revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23392883474|time triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Edit_conflict%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Edit_conflict%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{nottobeconfusedwith|Wikipedia:Edit warring}} {{Documentation subpage}} {{high-use}} {{template shortcut|ec|EC}} <!-- Please place categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]) -->
== Usage == This template is used to indicate that you encountered an [[Help:Edit conflict|edit conflict]] when you were replying to a comment in a discussion. *Adding {{tlc|edit conflict}} produces: {{edit conflict}}
The number of conflicts you encountered may also be specified as an unnamed parameter to the template. *For example, {{tlc|edit conflict|3}} produces: {{edit conflict|3}}
This template may help to indicate that one is replying to an older state of a discussion and may not take more recent replies into account.
=== Substitution === This template also may be [[Wikipedia:Substitution|substituted]]: * {{tlsx|edit conflict}}
== Redirects == * [[Template:Conflict]] * [[:en:Template:Ec|Template:Ec]] * [[:en:Template:Ec|Template:Ec]] * [[Template:Editconf]] * [[Template:Editconflict]]
== See also == * [[Wikipedia:Talk page guidelines]]
{{Inline talk templates}} <includeonly>{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|testcases|| <!-- Categories below this line, please; interwikis at Wikidata --> }}}}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Inline talk templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Edit_conflict%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{nottobeconfusedwith|Wikipedia:Edit warring}}
{{Documentation subpage}}
{{high-use}}
{{template shortcut|ec|EC}}

== Usage ==
This template is used to indicate that you encountered an [[Help:Edit conflict|edit conflict]] when you were replying to a comment in a discussion.
*Adding {{tlc|edit conflict}} produces: {{edit conflict}}
 
The number of conflicts you encountered may also be specified as an unnamed parameter to the template.
*For example, {{tlc|edit conflict|3}} produces: {{edit conflict|3}}

This template may help to indicate that one is replying to an older state of a discussion and may not take more recent replies into account.

=== Substitution ===
This template also may be [[Wikipedia:Substitution|substituted]]:
* {{tlsx|edit conflict}}

== Redirects ==
* [[Template:Conflict]]
* [[:en:Template:Ec|Template:Ec]]
* [[:en:Template:Ec|Template:Ec]]
* [[Template:Editconf]]
* [[Template:Editconflict]]

== See also ==
* [[Wikipedia:Talk page guidelines]]

{{Inline talk templates}}
<includeonly>{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|sandbox||{{#ifeq:{{SUBPAGENAME}}|testcases||

}}}}</includeonly>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Inline talk templates]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
